description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit Tests that runs on pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: test_x86_64 and test_aarch64. test_x86_64 should run on a matrix of Python versions 3.7, 3.9, 3.11, 3.13 and operating systems ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest. test_aarch64 should run on a matrix of Python versions cp38-cp38, cp310-cp310, cp312-cp312 with aarch64 architecture. Both jobs should check out the repository, install dependencies, and run tests with pytest.
